title: Attend Orientation
notes: Pick up orientation packet. CDM sheets and attendance log will be printed for you.

title: Upload Orientation Packet to Canvas
notes: Combine all orientation documents into a single PDF. Upload at end of rotation. If shelf is after rotation, email coordinator attendance log + CDM sheets after last shift.

title: Nursing Shift
notes: Report to Nueces Conference Room. PC charge will assign you to a nurse. Tell them you are reporting for your nursing shift.

title: Clinical Shifts in ED
notes: Arrive on time. On Wednesdays with Grand Rounds: leave shift at 1pm to keep 10-hour break and avoid duty hour violations.

title: Clinical Decision Making Worksheets
location: In ED — fill out at end of each shift
notes: Attending SIGNATURE REQUIRED as proof of attendance. If unable to get signature, notify coordinator ASAP. Compile all sheets for end-of-rotation upload.

title: Shift Card Evaluations
location: One45 → To Do’s — self-send eval link per shift
notes: Assign each shift card to the attending you worked with. Contact coordinator if issues sending evals. Need 10 total at end of rotation.

title: Log Clinical Encounters & Skills
location: One45 → eDossier → PI/Procedure Log → Create New Log
notes: Enter required procedures/encounters for each shift date. SIM skills: log as Faculty “Dolson”, M, W, Adult, OP, Virtual. Complete EM Eval 1 and EM Eval 2.

title: Mid-Rotation Quiz
notes: 2nd Friday of rotation. 15-question quiz. Results and feedback from residents/faculty will be sent to you by the coordinator.

title: EM Resident Evaluations
notes: Choose 2 residents you worked with during the rotation. Ask them to complete the evaluation of your performance before rotation ends.

title: MSH E-FAST US Didactic Eval Form
notes: Complete before rotation ends.

title: SIM Session Evaluation
notes: Complete before rotation ends.

title: Procedure/Suture Skills Evaluation
notes: Complete before rotation ends.

title: Attend Grand Rounds & Didactics
notes: Grand Rounds and Didactics are both on Wednesdays. Coordinator posts schedule to Canvas Announcements. You only attend select Grand Rounds throughout the rotation.

title: US FAST Lab Pre-Survey
notes: Complete BEFORE the Ultrasound IV FAST Lab session. Survey remains open until the last day of rotation.

title: Ultrasound IV FAST Lab
notes: Students scan each other (no standardized patients). Bring stethoscope. Assigned to one of two groups by coordinator.

title: US FAST Lab Post-Survey
notes: Complete AFTER the Ultrasound IV FAST Lab session. Open until last day of rotation.

title: Simulation Lab Session
location: Simulation Lab — check coordinator for location
notes: BRING YOUR STETHOSCOPE. Split into two groups; attend 1 sim lab session.

title: Synthesis Shock Session
notes: Split into two groups; attend 1 Synthesis Shock (Syn) session.

title: EM History Taking Direct Observation
location: In ED — template printed for you at orientation
notes: Perform an observed history in the ED. Template is in Canvas and will be printed on the day of orientation.

title: NBME Shelf Exam Review
notes: Thursday before the shelf exam. 8am–10am.

title: NBME EM Shelf Exam
notes: Last Friday of rotation. Must score 64 points or better to pass EMED 3005. Class of 2025.
